positioning: Practical Japanese cards for JFT-Basic / SSW / Work-in-Japan preparation, initially for Indonesian learners with English fallback.
source_policy: Original learner-facing content only. Public JFT-Basic, Irodori/JF Can-do, and SSW materials may guide structure, domains, task types, and level expectations, but must not be copied or near-cloned.

decks.title: JFT-Basic / SSW Work-in-Japan Japanese
decks.description: Exam-aligned and work-life practical Japanese cards for learners preparing to live and work in Japan.

packs.title: Indonesian Stage 1B Validation Sample
packs.description: Free validation sample covering five card modes across JFT-Basic / SSW work-life domains.
packs.target_segment: Indonesian learners preparing for JFT-Basic / SSW / Work-in-Japan practical Japanese.
packs.next_step: Convert reviewed Stage 1B draft cards into data/cards.stage1b.id.sample.json after schema v2 is accepted.

packs.title: Indonesian Paid Starter Core
packs.description: Future 400-600 card paid starter pack after validation evidence.
packs.target_segment: Indonesian JFT-Basic / SSW learners who need a broader practical starter product.
packs.next_step: Do not implement until the Stage 1B validation sample gives enough evidence.

packs.title: Indonesian Full Core
packs.description: Future 1,000-1,500 exposure core across JFT-Basic and practical work-life domains.
packs.target_segment: Indonesian learners needing a fuller JFT/SSW preparation product.

packs.title: Future Field-Specific SSW Packs
packs.description: Placeholder for later care worker, manufacturing/safety, food service, cleaning, accommodation, agriculture, and other field-specific packs.
packs.target_segment: Learners who need job-field-specific Japanese after the general starter is validated.
packs.next_step: Do not build before paid starter demand is validated.
